---
title: "About Me"
---

## Hi, I'm Aleksandra.
I am a chemist turned an IT professional. Together with my husband and three kids I live in Belgium, whereas until 2012 I lived in Poland. I enjoy books, jigsaw puzzle and interesting conversations. I try to play cello and run - both with rather limited outcomes but a lot of enjoyment. Welcome to my blog, I wish you will find here something interesting.
